summary: The diff updates the stable owner principal in backend/main.mo to 'q5rzs-s67ph-qtb5w-e66j5-2iqax-vlwa5-5pqxy-yosti-xhcis-ocfw6-yqe' as required by REQ-27. The principal is set as a let binding and used in ensureOwner checks. A migration module was also added. The project_state.json reflects the updated principal. No frontend files were modified.

hallucinated_features.description: A new migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added with a Migration.run function and type definitions for the actor state.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-27 only requested updating the stable owner principal value. Adding a migration module with a migration runner was not requested in the build requirements.
